heading: Unfunded priorities of the national technology and industrial base: annual report
label: 4815 Unfunded priorities of the national technology and industrial base: annual report

amendments: Amendments2021— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 116–283section 2504a of this title

Effective Date of 2021 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with additional provisions for delayed implementation and applicability of existing law, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 116–283section 1801(d) of Pub. L. 116–283section 3001 of this titleJan. 1, 2022

children.heading: .—Annual Report
children.label: a .—Annual Report
children.text: Not later than 10 days after the date on which the budget of the President for a fiscal year is submitted to Congress pursuant to , the Under Secretary of Defense for Acquisition and Sustainment shall submit to the Secretary of Defense, the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, and the congressional defense committees a report on the unfunded priorities to address gaps or vulnerabilities in the national technology and industrial base.section 1105 of title 31

children.label: A
children.text: A summary description of such priority, including the objectives to be achieved if such priority is funded (whether in whole or in part).

children.label: B
children.text: The additional amount of funds recommended in connection with the objectives under subparagraph (A).

children.label: i
children.text: Line Item Number (LIN) for applicable procurement accounts.

children.label: ii
children.text: Program Element (PE) number for applicable research, development, test, and evaluation accounts.

children.label: iii
children.text: Sub-activity group (SAG) for applicable operation and maintenance accounts.

children.heading: .—Prioritization of priorities
children.label: 2 .—Prioritization of priorities
children.text: Each report shall present the unfunded priorities covered by such report in order of urgency of priority.
is not funded in the budget of the President for the fiscal year as submitted to Congress pursuant to ;section 1105 of title 31
is necessary to address gaps or vulnerabilities in the national technology and industrial base; and

children.label: A
children.text: additional resources had been available for the budget to fund the program, activity, or mission requirement; or

children.label: B
children.text: the program, activity, or mission requirement had emerged before the budget was formulated.
